data.description:
Document the `session_log` ticket type, its exemptions, and the title-summary
convention across the agent-facing docs.

## Why

Agents discover behavior through `CLAUDE.md` and `docs/`. The new type, its
gate/lifecycle exemptions, its query-visibility rules, and the (unenforced)
title-summary convention must be written down so agents use it correctly.

## What

- Update `CLAUDE.md`: add `session_log` to the MCP/CLI tool descriptions and the
  ticket-type matrix, noting it is gate/lifecycle-exempt, non-blocking-links-only,
  Jira-excluded, searchable-but-hidden-from-`list`, and that titles should carry a
  short work summary (guidance, not enforced).
- Update `docs/architecture.md` and `docs/event-schema.md` for the type and the
  graph/health compile-exclusion seam.
- Update `docs/output-schemas.md` for the recent-logs tool's `outputSchema`.

## Scope

Documentation only.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` describes `session_log`, its exemptions, visibility, Jira
      exclusion, and the title-summary convention (explicitly "not enforced").
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` / `docs/event-schema.md` cover the type and the
      compile-exclusion seam.
- [ ] `docs/output-schemas.md` documents the recent-logs output shape.
- [ ] Docs match the shipped behavior (cross-checked against the other stories).
data.title: Document session_log type, exemptions, and title-summary convention
